description_long: This is a bald adult male figure dressed in a formal, urban outfit. He wears a long, tailored overcoat over a collared shirt and tie, paired with fitted trousers and sturdy shoes. The coat is buttoned and extends to mid-thigh, giving a businesslike appearance suitable for city environments. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and his posture is upright and neutral. The facial features are clean-shaven, and the overall build is average, with realistic human proportions. The clothing and accessories suggest he could be a professional or office worker in an urban setting.
description: A bald adult male in a formal overcoat, shirt, tie, trousers, and sturdy shoes, standing upright with a businesslike appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bald head, facial features, collared shirt, tie, and the full length of the overcoat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the drape of the overcoat, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the overcoat, the seam details, and the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm position, and the side seam of the coat.
attribute_clothing_type: formal overcoat, collared shirt, necktie, tailored trousers
